amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 3 — paragraph 1 — point 1 d (new)
parliament_text:
(1d) ‘general purpose AI system’ means an AI system that can be used in and adapted to a wide range of applications for which it was not intentionally and specifically designed;

‘general purpose AI system’ means an AI system that can be used in and adapted to a wide range of applications for which it was not intentionally and specifically designed;
